title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Straw Hat Pirates, Nami, Unknown person #2, Big Mom, Unknown person #3 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.text: The next time I had a

dialogue.text: I don't approve of this ALLANCE, either! at the end of the day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The big mom pirates will be the ones left standing!

dialogue.text: ONIGA- SHINA, THE BROTHEL ON THE MOUNTAIN PATH

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are we gonna do, usopp? Big mom, she...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Started chasing after Nami and the others!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: She's planning on taking zes back....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, I hate to say it, but we're in the clear now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She took just one shot at the tank and it activated some kind of transforma- lion!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, Kin'Emon was able to move on! We kinda saved the day!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, and I'm sure Nami's group will figure things out....!! They've got Sanji with them, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But Sanji in a brothel... kinda worries me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm with you on that one!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no need to rush. They're headed for the stage. They've got no way out!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: C'mon, mister sun! Stop calling big mom!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What should we do, Nami? She'll kill us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that what he came for!? He's Unbe- Lievable!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, we need to ditch big mom and find momonsuke- same!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Are you sons of Bitches ReadyY!? ♙�

dialogue.text: Brother Crochi's got a special presentation!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be surprised! This is the son of Kozukioden, who was supposed to have died 20 years ago!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 53 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
